title: EU AI Act in Healthcare: 15 Steps to Ensure Your Company’s Compliance
summary:
The European Union’s Artificial Intelligence Act, which came into effect on August 1, 2024, has ushered in a new era of AI regulation with global implications. This groundbreaking legislation extends its reach beyond European borders, affecting all entities utilizing AI technology that impacts EU citizens or employees – regardless of the company’s physical location.
